2606.05833.title: Learning Geometric Representations from Videos for Spatial Intelligent Multimodal Large Language Models
2606.05833.paper_summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel at 2D semantic understanding but lack intrinsic 3D awareness, resulting in representations that fail to maintain geometric and spatial consistency across video frames. Given the scarcity of large-scale 3D data, we present GeoVR, a novel framework that learns geometric representations using purely 2D video sequences. This approach effectively restructures the semantic latent space within MLLMs to unlock spatial intelligence. Rather than employing superficial feature mixing, GeoVR reshapes the internal representations of the MLLM by distilling geometry knowledge from pre-trained 3D foundation models. This is accomplished through a multi-objective learning strategy driven by four complementary geometric targets: (1) estimating inter-frame camera poses to embed varying viewpoint dynamics, (2) regressing dense depth maps to anchor physical distances, (3) predicting a metric scale factor for real-world calibration, and (4) distilling multi-scale 3D features to align the intermediate feature space. Guided by these explicit physical and geometric constraints, the model's internal representations naturally develop strong 3D awareness. Extensive experiments on spatial reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that GeoVR achieves state-of-the-art performance, establishing a new paradigm for endowing foundation models with spatial intelligence.
2606.05833.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在2D語義理解方面表現出色，但缺乏內在的3D意識，導致其表示無法在視頻幀之間保持幾何和空間的一致性。鑒於大規模3D數據的稀缺，我們提出了GeoVR，這是一個新穎的框架，利用純2D視頻序列學習幾何表示。這種方法有效地重構了MLLM中的語義潛在空間，以解鎖空間智能。GeoVR並不是通過表面特徵混合來實現，而是通過從預訓練的3D基礎模型中提煉幾何知識來重塑MLLM的內部表示。這是通過一種多目標學習策略實現的，該策略由四個互補的幾何目標驅動：（1）估計幀間相機姿勢以嵌入不同視點的動態，（2）回歸密集深度圖以固定物理距離，（3）預測實際校準的度量比例因子，以及（4）提煉多尺度3D特徵以對齊中間特徵空間。在這些明確的物理和幾何約束的指導下，模型的內部表示自然地發展出強大的3D意識。在空間推理基準上的廣泛實驗表明，GeoVR達到了最先進的性能，為賦予基礎模型空間智能建立了一個新的範式。
2606.05833.author: Haibo Wang et.al.
